description: Genius of Liberty PUBLISHED BY TIIE EXECUTIVE COMMITTEE OF THE ILLINOIS ANTISLAVERY SOCIETY u We hold these truths to be selfevident that all men are created equal and endowed by their Creator with certain inalienable rights that among these are life liberty and the pursuit pp r Vol I LOWELL LA SALLE COUNTY ILLINOIS SATURDAY JANUARY 1 1842 No 41 H WARREN Z EASTMAN Editors and Publishing Agents TermsTwo Dollars per annum in advance Subscriptions for six months will be received at the same rate Quarterly subscriptions will be received at 50 cents each provided companies shall be formed to take no less than 10 copies and payment ac company the order 07 Advertisements will be inserted at the usual prices 07 All letters must be directed post paid to the Editors of the Genius of Liberty Fermi l ionville La Salle County Illinois 7 Postmasters are authorised to enclose money for subscribers in letters to Publishers oj newspapers and frank the same if signed by themselves AGENTS The following persons are authorized to re ceive subscriptions for the Genius of Liberty Madison Durley James G Dunlavy Samuel K Lewis James G Laughlin Rev O Lovejoy LLINOIS Florid Putnam Co
